posts.author: ilariatottolo2 (ilaria)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Hi monday.com team,

I’d like to share a few suggestions regarding the current export functionality for both dashboards and boards:

Dashboards:

The new Export to PDF option is a good start, but currently:

  • It doesn’t include subitems in the export.

  • The vertical/horizontal layout toggle doesn’t seem to work.

  • The option to split content across multiple PDF pages is not functional.

Boards:

Currently, we can export to Excel, but it would be great to also have a PDF export option.

These enhancements would really improve reporting and sharing capabilities. Thanks for considering this feedback!

What are you trying to achieve

It would be incredibly helpful if, in Dashboards:

  • Subitems could be included in the export.

  • There were more format options (e.g. Excel).

  • Exports could also include group/board footers when applicable.

Ideally, in boards it would be great to also have a PDF export option. This would allow us to export:

  • The main table view.

  • Any custom table views we’ve created.

  • Including subitems as well.
